slices.name: TestCreateFileMapV3CLI
slices.code:
10 | class TestCreateFileMapV3CLI(unittest.TestCase):
  11 |     def run_cli(self, args, cwd=None):
  12 |         result = subprocess.run(
  13 |             [sys.executable, str(pathlib.Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / "create_file_map_v3.py")] + args,
  14 |             cwd=cwd or str(pathlib.Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]),
  15 |             capture_output=True,
  16 |             text=True,
  17 |         )
  18 |         return result
  19 | 
  20 |     # --- v2 compatibility ---
  21 | 
  22 |     def test_v2_csv_schema_output(self):
  23 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
  24 |             root = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "repo"
  25 |             root.mkdir(parents=True)
  26 |             file_path = root / "hello.py"
  27 |             file_path.write_text("print('hello')\n", encoding="utf-8")
  28 | 
  29 |             out_csv = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "file_map.csv"
  30 |             result = self.run_cli(["--roots", str(root), "--out", str(out_csv)])
  31 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
  32 |             self.assertTrue(out_csv.exists())
  33 | 
  34 |             with out_csv.open("r", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as handle:
  35 |                 reader = csv.DictReader(handle)
  36 |                 self.assertEqual(reader.fieldnames, ["root", "rel_path", "abs_path", "ext", "size", "mtime_iso", "sha1"])
  37 |                 rows = list(reader)
  38 |             self.assertEqual(len(rows), 1)
  39 |             self.assertEqual(rows[0]["rel_path"], "hello.py")
  40 | 
  41 |     def test_out_alias_with_warning(self):
  42 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
  43 |             root = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "repo"
  44 |             root.mkdir(parents=True)
  45 |             (root / "hello.py").write_text("print('hello')\n", encoding="utf-8")
  46 |             out_csv = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "file_map.csv"
  47 | 
  48 |             result = self.run_cli(["--roots", str(root), "-o", str(out_csv)])
  49 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
  50 |             self.assertTrue(out_csv.exists())
  51 |             self.assertIn("Using -o as an alias for --out", result.stderr)
  52 | 
  53 |     # --- legacy profile still works ---
  54 | 
  55 |     def test_profile_filters_by_extension(self):
  56 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
  57 |             root = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "repo"
  58 |             root.mkdir(parents=True)
  59 |             (root / "keep.py").write_text("print('keep')\n", encoding="utf-8")
  60 |             (root / "skip.txt").write_text("skip me\n", encoding="utf-8")
  61 |             out_csv = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "file_map.csv"
  62 | 
  63 |             result = self.run_cli(["--roots", str(root), "--out", str(out_csv), "--profile", "python"])
  64 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
  65 |             with out_csv.open("r", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as handle:
  66 |                 rows = list(csv.DictReader(handle))
  67 |             self.assertEqual(len(rows), 1)
  68 |             self.assertEqual(rows[0]["rel_path"], "keep.py")
  69 | 
  70 |     # --- required profile names ---
  71 | 
  72 |     def test_required_profile_python_project(self):
  73 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
  74 |             root = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "repo"
  75 |             root.mkdir(parents=True)
  76 |             (root / "main.py").write_text("print('main')\n", encoding="utf-8")
  77 |             venv = root / ".venv" / "lib"
  78 |             venv.mkdir(parents=True)
  79 |             (venv / "some.py").write_text("# venv file\n", encoding="utf-8")
  80 |             out_csv = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "file_map.csv"
  81 | 
  82 |             result = self.run_cli(["--roots", str(root), "--out", str(out_csv), "--profile", "python_project"])
  83 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
  84 |             with out_csv.open("r", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as handle:
  85 |                 rows = list(csv.DictReader(handle))
  86 |             rel_paths = [r["rel_path"] for r in rows]
  87 |             self.assertIn("main.py", rel_paths)
  88 |             self.assertFalse(any(".venv" in p for p in rel_paths), "python_project must exclude .venv")
  89 | 
  90 |     def test_required_profile_polyglot_runtime(self):
  91 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
  92 |             root = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "repo"
  93 |             root.mkdir(parents=True)
  94 |             (root / "app.py").write_text("print('app')\n", encoding="utf-8")
  95 |             (root / "index.ts").write_text("export {};\n", encoding="utf-8")
  96 |             nm = root / "node_modules" / "pkg"
  97 |             nm.mkdir(parents=True)
  98 |             (nm / "index.js").write_text("// pkg\n", encoding="utf-8")
  99 |             out_csv = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "file_map.csv"
 100 | 
 101 |             result = self.run_cli(["--roots", str(root), "--out", str(out_csv), "--profile", "polyglot_runtime"])
 102 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
 103 |             with out_csv.open("r", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as handle:
 104 |                 rows = list(csv.DictReader(handle))
 105 |             rel_paths = [r["rel_path"] for r in rows]
 106 |             self.assertFalse(any("node_modules" in p for p in rel_paths), "polyglot_runtime must exclude node_modules")
 107 |             self.assertTrue(any("app.py" in p for p in rel_paths))
 108 |             self.assertTrue(any("index.ts" in p for p in rel_paths))
 109 | 
 110 |     def test_required_profile_training_pipeline(self):
 111 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
 112 |             root = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "repo"
 113 |             root.mkdir(parents=True)
 114 |             (root / "train.py").write_text("# training\n", encoding="utf-8")
 115 |             (root / "config.yaml").write_text("lr: 0.001\n", encoding="utf-8")
 116 |             ckpt = root / "checkpoints"
 117 |             ckpt.mkdir(parents=True)
 118 |             (ckpt / "model.bin").write_text("", encoding="utf-8")
 119 |             out_csv = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "file_map.csv"
 120 | 
 121 |             result = self.run_cli(["--roots", str(root), "--out", str(out_csv), "--profile", "training_pipeline"])
 122 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
 123 |             with out_csv.open("r", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as handle:
 124 |                 rows = list(csv.DictReader(handle))
 125 |             rel_paths = [r["rel_path"] for r in rows]
 126 |             self.assertFalse(any("checkpoints" in p for p in rel_paths), "training_pipeline must exclude checkpoints")
 127 |             self.assertTrue(any("train.py" in p for p in rel_paths))
 128 | 
 129 |     def test_required_profile_node_python_runtime(self):
 130 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
 131 |             root = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "repo"
 132 |             root.mkdir(parents=True)
 133 |             (root / "server.py").write_text("# server\n", encoding="utf-8")
 134 |             (root / "client.ts").write_text("// client\n", encoding="utf-8")
 135 |             nm = root / "node_modules" / "pkg"
 136 |             nm.mkdir(parents=True)
 137 |             (nm / "index.js").write_text("// pkg\n", encoding="utf-8")
 138 |             venv = root / "venv" / "lib"
 139 |             venv.mkdir(parents=True)
 140 |             (venv / "util.py").write_text("# venv\n", encoding="utf-8")
 141 |             out_csv = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "file_map.csv"
 142 | 
 143 |             result = self.run_cli(["--roots", str(root), "--out", str(out_csv), "--profile", "node_python_runtime"])
 144 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
 145 |             with out_csv.open("r", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as handle:
 146 |                 rows = list(csv.DictReader(handle))
 147 |             rel_paths = [r["rel_path"] for r in rows]
 148 |             self.assertFalse(any("node_modules" in p for p in rel_paths), "node_python_runtime must exclude node_modules")
 149 |             self.assertFalse(any("venv" in p for p in rel_paths), "node_python_runtime must exclude venv")
 150 |             self.assertTrue(any("server.py" in p for p in rel_paths))
 151 |             self.assertTrue(any("client.ts" in p for p in rel_paths))
 152 | 
 153 |     # --- health report and pollution ---
 154 | 
 155 |     def test_health_report_and_pollution(self):
 156 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
 157 |             root = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "repo"
 158 |             repo_path = root / "node_modules"
 159 |             repo_path.mkdir(parents=True)
 160 |             (repo_path / "ignore.py").write_text("print('ignored')\n", encoding="utf-8")
 161 |             out_csv = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "file_map.csv"
 162 |             health_report = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "health.json"
 163 | 
 164 |             result = self.run_cli([
 165 |                 "--roots",
 166 |                 str(root),
 167 |                 "--out",
 168 |                 str(out_csv),
 169 |                 "--health-report",
 170 |                 str(health_report),
 171 |                 "--exclude-dirs",
 172 |                 ".git,.venv,venv,__pycache__,.pytest_cache,.idea,.vscode,dist,build,.next",
 173 |             ])
 174 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
 175 |             self.assertTrue(health_report.exists())
 176 |             data = json.loads(health_report.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 177 |             self.assertEqual(data["pollution_count"], 1)
 178 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "WARN")
 179 | 
 180 |     def test_fail_on_pollution_exit_code(self):
 181 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
 182 |             root = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "repo"
 183 |             repo_path = root / "node_modules"
 184 |             repo_path.mkdir(parents=True)
 185 |             (repo_path / "ignore.py").write_text("print('ignored')\n", encoding="utf-8")
 186 |             out_csv = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "file_map.csv"
 187 |             health_report = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "health.json"
 188 | 
 189 |             result = self.run_cli([
 190 |                 "--roots",
 191 |                 str(root),
 192 |                 "--out",
 193 |                 str(out_csv),
 194 |                 "--health-report",
 195 |                 str(health_report),
 196 |                 "--fail-on-pollution",
 197 |                 "--exclude-dirs",
 198 |                 ".git,.venv,venv,__pycache__,.pytest_cache,.idea,.vscode,dist,build,.next",
 199 |             ])
 200 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 2)
 201 |             self.assertTrue(health_report.exists())
 202 |             data = json.loads(health_report.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 203 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "BLOCK")
 204 | 
 205 |     def test_fail_on_pollution_without_health_report(self):
 206 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
 207 |             root = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "repo"
 208 |             repo_path = root / "node_modules"
 209 |             repo_path.mkdir(parents=True)
 210 |             (repo_path / "ignore.py").write_text("print('ignored')\n", encoding="utf-8")
 211 |             out_csv = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "file_map.csv"
 212 | 
 213 |             result = self.run_cli([
 214 |                 "--roots",
 215 |                 str(root),
 216 |                 "--out",
 217 |                 str(out_csv),
 218 |                 "--fail-on-pollution",
 219 |                 "--exclude-dirs",
 220 |                 ".git,.venv,venv,__pycache__,.pytest_cache,.idea,.vscode,dist,build,.next",
 221 |             ])
 222 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 2, "--fail-on-pollution must exit 2 without --health-report when pollution found")
 223 | 
 224 |     def test_no_pollution_exits_zero_with_fail_flag(self):
 225 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
 226 |             root = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "repo"
 227 |             root.mkdir(parents=True)
 228 |             (root / "clean.py").write_text("print('clean')\n", encoding="utf-8")
 229 |             out_csv = pathlib.Path(temp_dir) / "file_map.csv"
 230 | 
 231 |             result = self.run_cli([
 232 |                 "--roots",
 233 |                 str(root),
 234 |                 "--out",
 235 |                 str(out_csv),
 236 |                 "--fail-on-pollution",
 237 |             ])
 238 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, "--fail-on-pollution must not exit non-zero when there is no pollution")
